name: Jade Cat
description:
Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You fall or attempt an Acrobatics check to

Requirements You are trained in Acrobatics

A thumb-sized feline carved of rare stone, the jade cat is typically worn as a pendant upon a suit of armor. For 1 minute after you activate the cat, you treat all falls as 20 feet shorter, you are not when you Balance, and narrow surfaces and uneven ground are not difficult terrain for you.
